enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder at 1:16am, excited after finally working on his website using a faster computer his mom helped him buy. He explains he had been sidetracked for two years working on Google Earth files instead of his site, and now with the better machine he's rapidly building out pages. He also mentions needing to sell his car and doing some prep work on it.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: transformative — finally able to build his website at real speed after years of slow machines holding him back
self-critical — admits he was calling Google Earth work 'website work' and never actually worked on the site
extremely excited and energized, feels like he's making up for lost time

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't get enough sleep because I went three days with only three or four hours of sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up after eight hours of sleep but have been up all night.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm freaking out because it's 16 in the morning and I'm excited about working on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: For the last few years, I've been working on my website using old, cheap computers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought I would spend money on other things like my character or bike touring instead of getting a good computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Two years ago, my mom talked me into getting a new computer for around $1,000.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The new computer is ten times faster for working on big websites like mine.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Right before getting the new computer, I started working on Google Earth stuff instead of my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't worked on my website since getting the fast computer because I was too busy with other things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: A couple of days ago, I started working on my website with the new computer for the first time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The new computer makes it easy to copy, paste, and create pages quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm fired up to work on my website now because it's no longer a struggle to maintain it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to sell my car soon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got some paper mache boots to fix the rocket box yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to use the rest of my paint to paint around the bumper before selling the car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm packing some papers, but the car isn't quite ready to sell yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm amazed at how much I'm getting done today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went through the 'thank you for level' page but gave up on it, leaving it scattered.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked on the Bibles section and the audio box, adding a bunch of ads.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to put up half-baked pages that are really good but haven't been leaked on my website yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm excited about how much progress I'm making on my website now.
